# DJ Zippy

> DJ Zippy (Veljko Nedeljković) is a House and Tech-House DJ and selector based in Belgrade, Serbia, and the creator of the "House Music Therapy" mix series. He has performed at Exit Festival (AS FM Stage 2024, Dance Arena and Students Stage 2025) and at leading clubs across Serbia and the region.

## Key facts

- Real name: Veljko Nedeljković
- Stage names: DJ Zippy, Zippy, Zovumezippy
- Based in: Belgrade, Serbia
- Genres: House, Tech House, Deep House, Organic House, Techno
- Brand: House Music Therapy
- Affiliations: Kult Talents, Izuvanje, Go2 Travel (collaboration)
- Languages: Serbian, English
- Booking email: veljkoned@gmail.com
- Official website: https://zippydj.com

## Pages

- [Home](https://zippydj.com/): Overview, featured mixes, upcoming events, booking.
- [About](https://zippydj.com/about): Biography, artist philosophy, affiliations, FAQ.
- [Mixes](https://zippydj.com/mixes): Full catalog of DJ Zippy mixes and playlists on YouTube, MixCloud, Spotify, and SoundCloud.
- [Events](https://zippydj.com/events): Upcoming gigs and past performance history.
- [Links](https://zippydj.com/links): All official social and streaming profiles.

## Notable performances

- 2024-07-12 — Exit Festival, AS FM Stage (Novi Sad, Serbia) — first major festival stage
- 2024-07-23 — Capital Night Club (Lefkada, Greece)
- 2025-07-12 — Exit Festival, Dance Arena (Novi Sad, Serbia) — first Dance Arena set
- 2025-07-12 — Exit Festival, Students Stage (Novi Sad, Serbia)
- 2025-08-19 — Toucan Nightclub (Zakynthos, Greece)
- 2026-03-18 — Club Kult (Belgrade, Serbia)

## Booking

Available for club bookings, private events, and festivals across Serbia and the EU.
Contact: veljkoned@gmail.com — https://zippydj.com/#contact
